---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect affecting runtime behavior, validation, or delivery
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the defect clearly.

## Affected area

- Runtime/API
- CI or coverage
- Deployment or staging continuation
- Docs or contracts

## Current behavior

What is happening now?

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Reproduction or evidence

Provide steps, failing routes, logs, screenshots, or test output.

## Impact

- [ ] Blocks local development
- [ ] Breaks automated tests or coverage
- [ ] Breaks staging or delivery flow
- [ ] Affects cross-repository contracts or SDK consumers

## Notes

Add routing, rollout, or follow-up context here.
